title: acritopappus buiquensis
intro: Acritopappus buiquensis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to South America, specifically in the Andean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acritopappus buiquensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in herbal teas and supplements.
